name: ppt-template-builder
description: Build branded performance presentation decks (.pptx) from any PowerPoint template. Extracts the template's exact visual chrome — header/footer bar images, backgrounds, fonts, colors — and builds fresh data-filled slides that match the brand perfectly. Supports KPI scorecards, trend charts, data tables, section dividers, and insights slides. Works with live Intentwise advertising data or any CSV upload.
author: kenton-web
